name: Milk Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out the ingredients in a cocktail shaker.
2. Add the brandy, vanilla extract, simple syrup, half-and-half, and milk to the shaker.
3. Fill the shaker with ice cubes.
4. Shake vigorously until chilled for about 15 seconds.
5. Strain the mixture into a cocktail glass.
6. Dust the top of the drink with freshly grated nutmeg.
7. Serve immediately.
Yield: 1 drink
